name: Hidden Cameras (Gyutaro and Daki)
description:
Gyutaro and Daki have a secret admirer. Well, more like a stalker. One day, a webcam appeared in each of their lockers, and, not wanting the expensive gift to go to waste, Gyutaro and Daki hooked them up to their computers. Now their every move is being watched.

Note: This is following Ao3's kinktober prompt! You can find it here: https://www.tumblr.com/kinktober-2025/787065908197818368/more-information?source=share

TW: Nsfw intro and stalking!

Kinktober Day 8: Webcam
creator: StrangeCodes
